title: Countertop Cooling Rack
summary: A three-tier stand that holds removable cooling trays, freeing up counter space when you're baking in batches. Built from 1x2 around trays you buy.
description:
A vertical stand that holds three removable cooling trays, so a batch bake doesn't sprawl across every inch of counter. You buy the trays (roughly 11-3/4" x 17") and build a simple 1x2 frame around them — each tray sits in its own cradle of cleats, and the three cradles stack on legs.

The whole plan is really one measurement: build each tray frame about 1/4" bigger than your actual tray so it slides in and out easily. Measure your trays, not the nominal size, because bakeware varies. The cleats run inside to catch the tray, and the front horizontal pieces set the width.

It's a beginner build — straight cuts, glue, and brad nails — but a genuinely useful one for anyone who bakes cookies or bread in quantity. Size the depth and width cleats to your trays minus 1-1/2" for the depth cleats, adding about 1/4" clearance everywhere so the trays never bind.

tools.note: Crosscut the 1x2; a miter saw or hand saw also works.

cutList.note: Or the depth of your rack minus 1-1/2", plus ~1/4" clearance.
Or the width of your rack plus ~1/4" clearance.

steps.title: Build the three tray frames
steps.body: Build three tray frames, each about 1/4" bigger than your actual tray so the tray slides in and out easily. Measure your trays first — bakeware isn't consistent. Each frame is inside cleats plus front horizontals glued and brad-nailed together.

steps.title: Add the legs to the bottom rack
steps.body: Attach the four legs to the bottom tray frame, forming the base tier. Keep them square and equal so the stack sits level.

steps.title: Stack the remaining trays
steps.body: Add the remaining two tray frames up the legs, spacing them so a loaded tray clears the tray below. Sand any sharp edges — this lives on a kitchen counter — and finish with a food-safe finish or leave raw. Slide your trays in.

images.alt: Three-tier countertop cooling rack holding removable baking trays
